overview: Open-world souls-like where Tarnished warriors seek to become Elden Lord by collecting Great Runes and repairing the shattered Elden Ring. Features FromSoftware's signature difficult combat with unprecedented exploration freedom.
coreMechanics: Stamina management for attacks, dodges, and blocks
Flask of Crimson/Cerulean Tears (healing and FP restoration)
Sites of Grace (checkpoints, fast travel, level up)
Spirit Ashes (summonable allies for boss fights)
Torrent (spirit horse for exploration and combat)
Weapon Arts (special abilities powered by FP)

terminology.Tarnished: The player character, exiled and seeking the Elden Ring
terminology.Runes: Currency and experience points (lost on death)
terminology.Grace: Sites of Grace - checkpoints for rest and leveling
terminology.Vigor: Health stat - most important for survivability
terminology.Mind: FP (Focus Points) pool for spells and Ashes of War
terminology.FP: Focus Points - mana for magic and weapon arts
terminology.Torrent: Your spectral horse mount with double jump
terminology.Erdtree: Giant golden tree visible across the world

commonQuestions: What stats should I level first?
Where is the nearest Site of Grace?
How do I summon Spirit Ashes?
Where do I get more Flask charges?
What level should I be for this area?
How do I upgrade my weapon?
insiderTips: Vigor is king - aim for 40+ by mid-game, 60 endgame
Spirit Ashes aren't cheap or shameful - they're designed for boss fights
Explore everywhere - many areas are optional but have great rewards
Golden Seeds and Sacred Tears massively increase survivability
You can run past most overworld enemies on Torrent
Stance breaking (guard counter/charged heavies) trivializes many bosses
Level your weapon to +3 before first major boss (Margit)
Summon bell found at Church of Elleh from vendor Renna

progressionSystem.primary: Level up stats at Sites of Grace using Runes
progressionSystem.weaponUpgrade: Smithing Stones (+1 to +25) or Somber Stones (unique weapons)
